ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the sample was derived */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism from which the sample was derived */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the sample */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the sample */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the sample */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease or condition associated with the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch identifier for sample processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample used in the experiment */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay performed */,
  "comment_fraction_identifier" TEXT /* Fraction identifier for the experiment */,
  "comment_file_uri" TEXT /* File URI for the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "instrument_software" TEXT /* Software used with the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_settings" (
  "instrument_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument setting */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment performed */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the setting value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_settings_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  "file_source" TEXT /* Source of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_lists" (
  "peak_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak list */,
  "data_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file that generated the peak list */,
  "peak_list_name" TEXT /* Name of the peak list */,
  "peak_list_format" TEXT /* Format of the peak list */,
  "peak_list_date" TEXT /* Date when the peak list was generated */,
  "peak_list_source" TEXT /* Source of the peak list */,
  "peak_list_version" TEXT /* Version of the peak list format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_lists_data_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("data_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_identifications" (
  "protein_identification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein identification */,
  "peak_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak list that generated the identification */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein identified */,
  "protein_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein identified */,
  "identification_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein identification was made */,
  "identification_software" TEXT /* Software used for protein identification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the identification */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate associated with the identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_identification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_identifications_peak_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_list_id") REFERENCES peak_lists ("peak_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, lab manager, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g. login, logout, data download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notations" (
  "notation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample associated with the notation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the notation */,
  "notation_name" TEXT /* Name of the notation */,
  "notation_value" TEXT /* Value of the notation */,
  "notation_date" TEXT /* Date when the notation was created */,
  "notation_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notations_notation_creator FOREIGN KEY ("notation_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleavage_agents" (
  "cleavage_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleavage agent */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the cleavage agent */,
  "cleavage_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the cleavage agent */,
  "cleavage_agent_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the cleavage agent */,
  "cleavage_agent_concentration" TEXT /* Concentration of the cleavage agent */,
  "cleavage_agent_source" TEXT /* Source of the cleavage agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleavage_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleavage_agents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modification_parameters" (
  "modification_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the modification parameter */,
  "modification_parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification parameter */,
  "modification_parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the modification parameter */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification */,
  "modification_site" TEXT /* Site of the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modification_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the material type */,
  "material_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "material_source" TEXT /* Source of the material */,
  "material_purity" TEXT /* Purity of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_types_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_designs" (
  "experimental_design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the experimental design */,
  "experimental_design_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental design */,
  "experimental_design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  "design_creator" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experimental design */,
  "design_approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_designs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_designs_design_creator FOREIGN KEY ("design_creator") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "data_processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data processing step */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that used the data processing step */,
  "data_processing_name" TEXT /* Name of the data processing step */,
  "data_processing_description" TEXT /* Description of the data processing step */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data processing step was performed */,
  "processing_software" TEXT /* Software used for data processing */,
  "processing_version" TEXT /* Version of the processing software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
